line: GROVE_RESULT: success - saw watch now detects ApiHang, ToolLoop, TestLoop, and ScopeLeaking; supports --on-stuck/--on-scope-leak actions, --guard, and checkpoint save

line: GROVE_LESSONS:

- The repo state had already advanced beyond the original Phase 1 MVP, so the safest path was to extend existing `loop_detector`, `metrics`, and richer parser/types instead of rebuilding from the earlier minimal snapshot.

items: The repo state had already advanced beyond the original Phase 1 MVP, so the safest path was to extend existing `loop_detector`, `metrics`, and richer parser/types instead of rebuilding from the earlier minimal snapshot.

line: - Scope leak detection can work in one-shot mode by treating write-like tool calls as file modifications during state replay, even before a real filesystem watcher exists.

items: Scope leak detection can work in one-shot mode by treating write-like tool calls as file modifications during state replay, even before a real filesystem watcher exists.

line: - `cargo test` at workspace root is currently blocked by a missing `crates/saw-daemon` workspace member in `Cargo.toml`; targeted manifest-specific test/check commands are needed until the workspace is fixed.

items: `cargo test` at workspace root is currently blocked by a missing `crates/saw-daemon` workspace member in `Cargo.toml`; targeted manifest-specific test/check commands are needed until the workspace is fixed.

line: GROVE_DECISIONS:
- Kept Phase 2 scoped to the current one-shot `watch` architecture instead of adding daemon/tailing infrastructure from later phases.

items: Kept Phase 2 scoped to the current one-shot `watch` architecture instead of adding daemon/tailing infrastructure from later phases.

line: - Reused `compute_loop_score` plus command-pattern matching in the classifier for ToolLoop/TestLoop detection rather than inventing a second loop-analysis path.

items: Reused `compute_loop_score` plus command-pattern matching in the classifier for ToolLoop/TestLoop detection rather than inventing a second loop-analysis path.

line: - Implemented `checkpoint-kill` as a local `.saw/checkpoints/<timestamp>/` snapshot with copied modified files, `saw-state.json`, `session-snapshot.jsonl`, and `manifest.json`.

items: Implemented `checkpoint-kill` as a local `.saw/checkpoints/<timestamp>/` snapshot with copied modified files, `saw-state.json`, `session-snapshot.jsonl`, and `manifest.json`.

line: - Applied scope guard checks against normalized absolute guard paths in the CLI so `--guard src/auth` works predictably from the project root.

items: Applied scope guard checks against normalized absolute guard paths in the CLI so `--guard src/auth` works predictably from the project root.

line: GROVE_WARNINGS:
- `watch` is still a one-shot snapshot command, not a live tailing/process-monitor loop; this satisfies the phase deliverable in current architecture but not the eventual real-time design.

items: `watch` is still a one-shot snapshot command, not a live tailing/process-monitor loop; this satisfies the phase deliverable in current architecture but not the eventual real-time design.
